summary: Phase 1 logo upload feature verified end-to-end. Backend endpoints (POST /api/admin/logo, GET /api/public/asset/{id}) work correctly with auth enforcement, non-image rejection (400), 5MB limit, DB persistence and absolute PUBLIC_BASE_URL. Frontend flows verified: Settings > Branding uploader shows preview, persists across reload and updates admin-header logo; Signup optional logo uploader present and account creation works both WITH and WITHOUT a chosen logo; Onboarding Branding step uploader works and shows preview. 4/4 pytest backend tests pass; all UI assertions pass.

integration_issues.issue: When user picks a logo on /signup, it is uploaded to backend and tenant.logo_url is set, but on redirect to /onboarding the Branding step (step 1) shows the LogoUpload with 'No logo' placeholder because TenantOnboarding.js only syncs business_name/contact_email from tenant (line 25), not logo_url. The logo IS saved server-side and appears in admin header after finish, but the onboarding preview does not reflect it, which is confusing UX. Fix: include logo_url in the useEffect sync in TenantOnboarding.js.

action_items: Minor UX: sync logo_url from tenant into onboarding form so users who uploaded a logo at signup see it prefilled in the Branding step (TenantOnboarding.js line ~25).
critical_code_review_comments: storage_client.py uses a module-global _storage_key without a lock — safe with FastAPI's single-process reload, but note if switched to multi-worker.
uploads.py accepts SVG (image/svg+xml) — SVG can carry embedded scripts; consider sanitising or disallowing SVG for user-uploaded content in Phase 2.
Content-type check is by file extension only (not by sniffing bytes) — user can rename foo.exe to foo.png and pass validation. Consider using python-magic or PIL to verify actual image.
test_credentials: demo@studio-app.uk / Demo!2026 (worked). Signup created ephemeral qa+*@example.com accounts (left behind).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test tenants during signup smoke test (qa+<rand>@example.com and qa+nl<rand>@example.com). Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 logo upload complete and working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_logo_upload.py can be reused for regression. Only outstanding item is a small UX polish in TenantOnboarding.js to prefill logo_url from tenant on mount.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug, minor UX gap only.
